description: Time-limited promotional offers for food and beverage products with specific pricing, location details, and urgency-driven calls to action in Arabic.
structural_recipe: Lead with product name and fire/urgency emoji. State discount offer clearly with SAR pricing. Specify promotion duration (e.g., month-long). List all participating locations (branches, drive-thru). Use Arabic language exclusively. Include date/time constraints to create urgency. Format as multi-line caption for readability.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers respond strongly to time-limited offers and transparent pricing in local currency. Specifying exact SAR amounts and all branch locations reduces friction and builds trust. The combination of urgency (limited-time), accessibility (multiple locations), and specific value (quantified discount) aligns with Saudi purchasing psychology favoring deals and transparent merchant communication.
transplantation_caveats: Must use Arabic language for Saudi audience authenticity
Pricing must be in Saudi Riyal (SAR) with clear denomination
Verify all listed locations are accurate to avoid customer disappointment
Time-bound offers must have clearly stated expiration dates to comply with local advertising standards
Cultural note: Ramadan and local holidays significantly impact promotion effectiveness timing
cultural_constraints: Timing considerations for Ramadan and prayer times
Gender-specific products must align with cultural norms
